tasks.subject: Task 0: Capture V1 baseline against published-block code
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove V1 test suite passes unchanged on origin/main and capture baseline outputs (qc, alignReport, clones) for 'simple project' as the regression target.

**Files:**
- Read: test/src/wf.test.ts, test/assets/s1_R{1,2}.fastq.gz
- Create: docs/superpowers/plans/baselines/2026-05-21-v1-baseline.json

**Verify:** `rtk pnpm test` from worktree root, all 4 cases green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["test/src/wf.test.ts", "docs/superpowers/plans/baselines/2026-05-21-v1-baseline.json"], "verifyCommand": "rtk pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all four cases pass", "baseline JSON committed", "sanity check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: V1→V3 skeleton — BlockData, DataModelBuilder, ctx.data sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compile-green V3 model that behaves identically to V1 (no behavior change yet).

**Files:** model/src/index.ts, model/src/args.ts, ui/src/**/*.vue, ui/src/app.ts

**Verify:** `rtk pnpm build && rtk pnpm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["model/src/index.ts", "model/src/args.ts", "ui/src/pages/SettingsPanel.vue", "ui/src/app.ts"], "verifyCommand": "rtk pnpm build && rtk pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build green", "type-check green", "tests pass", "no ctx.args. or app.model.args. references"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Phase 0 audit — lock field channel decisions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Written mapping of every BlockArgs/UiState field to args / prerunArgs / data-only.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-21-amplicon-v3-and-preview.field-audit.md

**Verify:** Each args-row corresponds to a main.tpl.tengo `args.X` read; each prerunArgs-row to a prerun.tpl.tengo read; data-only fields read by neither.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-21-amplicon-v3-and-preview.field-audit.md", "workflow/src/main.tpl.tengo", "workflow/src/prerun.tpl.tengo"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all BlockArgs fields classified", "all UiState fields classified", "each row workflow-anchored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire .args() — validate, canonicalize, conditional limitInput
tasks.description:
**Goal:** V3 .args lambda matching the field audit. Throws on invalid, canonicalises tagPattern, suppresses limitInput when runMode==='full'.

**Files:** model/src/index.ts, model/src/args.ts

**Verify:** `rtk pnpm build && rtk pnpm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["model/src/index.ts", "model/src/args.ts"], "verifyCommand": "rtk pnpm build && rtk pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": [".args pure", "field set matches audit", "limitInput conditional", "throws on invalid"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire .prerunArgs() for repseqio discovery
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Discovery / build-library fields into .prerunArgs so they auto-rerun without a Run gate.

**Files:** model/src/index.ts

**Verify:** `rtk pnpm test` + pl MCP check that prerun re-runs and Run button does NOT stale on discovery edits.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["model/src/index.ts", "workflow/src/prerun.tpl.tengo"], "verifyCommand": "rtk pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": [".prerunArgs pure", "covers prerun template reads", "no Run-button stale on discovery edits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Add Preview/Full Run toggle to SettingsPanel.vue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** UI matching mixcr-clonotyping pattern — PlBtnGroup for runMode + conditional limitInput.

**Files:** ui/src/pages/SettingsPanel.vue

**Verify:** Manual pl MCP — `get_block_state transform: "data.runMode"` shows the toggle persists.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ui/src/pages/SettingsPanel.vue"], "verifyCommand": "rtk pnpm build:dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toggle renders", "limitInput conditional", "no args references"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Migrate test/src/wf.test.ts to V3 + add preview-mode case
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tests use mutateBlockStorage; add 'preview mode reads a subset' case asserting limitInput round-trip.

**Files:** test/src/wf.test.ts

**Verify:** `rtk pnpm test` → 5 green cases. Baseline parity vs Task 0 holds for simple project.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["test/src/wf.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "rtk pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 migrated cases pass", "1 new dry-run case passes", "baseline parity holds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: CID/dedup audit on workflow + model contract
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify no CID conflicts or dedup regressions from the V3 contract shift.

**Files:** read-only sweep of workflow/src/*.tpl.tengo + .lib.tengo; documentation in the field-audit.md

**Verify:** pl MCP test-by-duplication — 2nd identical-input instance cache-hits at the process step.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["workflow/src/main.tpl.tengo", "workflow/src/process.tpl.tengo", "workflow/src/mixcr-analyze.tpl.tengo", "workflow/src/repseqio-library.tpl.tengo", "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-21-amplicon-v3-and-preview.field-audit.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["args reads accounted", "splitDataAndSpec pattern intact", "hash_override intact", "duplication test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Verify legacy upgrade fires on a real V1 project
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm DataModelBuilder.upgradeLegacy actually fires for a V1-saved project under the V3 build, with full output parity.

**Files:** none — may produce a fixup commit in model/src/index.ts.

**Verify:** pl MCP `update_block` → `get_block_state transform: "data"` → review shape + run + compare to Task 0 baseline.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["model/src/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upgrade fires", "runMode derived correctly", "no undefined fields", "output parity with V1 baseline"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: SDK bump, changeset, final build, open PR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship-ready PR — block-tools 2.8.1, changeset, lockfile in sync.

**Files:** pnpm-workspace.yaml, pnpm-lock.yaml, .changeset/milab-6069-amplicon-v3.md

**Verify:** `rtk pnpm build && rtk pnpm test && git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pnpm-workspace.yaml", "pnpm-lock.yaml", ".changeset/milab-6069-amplicon-v3.md"], "verifyCommand": "rtk pnpm build && rtk pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["block-tools matches latest", "lockfile committed", "changeset present", "PR opened"]}
```
